/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/client.dir/client.cpp.o -o client  /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib64/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib64/libssl.so /usr/lib64/libcrypto.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.1
